title: Moradabad Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Moradabad with a Z-Score of +4.51. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Moradabad are characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 43%, and the wind speed is 6.4 km/h, which is not providing much relief to the residents. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating that there is no cooling effect, and the heat wave is expected to continue.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to stay safe.
